creator: scott@sremick.net
text: Bugzilla 4.0 was released on Feb 15th, 2011 and 4.0.1 on April 27th, but the ports tree still has 3.6.4. I've emailed the maintainer but not heard back. Is there someone who can take this on and update the ports tree? Or, is there some FreeBSD issue that is preventing or holding-up updating this port to 4.x? Thanks.
